compiled_state.title: Systematic: echo | grep -q patterns across test suite are SIGPIPE-vulnerable under pipefail
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Anti-pattern scan from fix of 1620-6850 and ffa0-fefe found ~50+ echo|grep -q patterns in tests/. The shared run_test.sh was fixed but individual test files still have the pattern. Under CI load with pipefail, these can intermittently return exit 141. Replace with bash [[ =~ ]] matching or grep -c.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 5 (INTERMEDIATE). Fix complexity: COMPLEX — 523 occurrences across 114 test files. Escalating per fix-bug Step 4.5.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Bug-Fix Mode — COMPLEX escalation. 523 echo|grep -q occurrences across 114 test files. Fix approach known (replace with [[ =~ ]] or grep -c), but scope requires epic-level batched execution. Deferred to a dedicated session.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 3 (INTERMEDIATE). severity=1, complexity=1, environment=1, intermittent=0. Systematic anti-pattern across ~50 test files.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: intent-aligned (high confidence). Prior fix e73e745d treated same pattern as defect. 546 occurrences across 117 test files remain.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fix complexity: COMPLEX (546 occurrences across 117 files). Fix approach is known (replace echo|grep -q with [[ =~ ]] or grep -c) but scope requires epic-level planning. Deferring to /dso:brainstorm in a dedicated session.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Bug-Fix Mode session 3 — COMPLEX classification confirmed (546 occurrences, 117 files). Fix approach unchanged: replace echo|grep -q with [[ =~ ]] or grep -c. Scope requires /dso:brainstorm to decompose into epic with batched execution stories. Deferring to dedicated brainstorm session.
